stemHtml: Which interpretation of the following message is correct? LFLD AD WRNG 1 VALID 050430/050900 FROST FCST=

options.a: It is forecast for the period between 04:30 and 09:00 on the 5th of that month that especially an aircraft in the final approach phase will be covered by hoar frost.
options.b: The aerodrome warning for runway 05 due to frost issued at 04:30 UTC has been cancelled at 09:00 UTC.
options.c: It is forecast for the period between 04:30 and 09:00 on the 5th of that month that a departing or arriving aircraft will pass through a layer of ground fog in which the aircraft will be contaminated by hoar frost.
options.d: It is forecast that some parts of the surface, vehicles, and aircraft parked outside will be contaminated by hoar frost between 04:30 and 09:00 on the 5th of that month.
